feed.title: Napleton Chicago Chevy Buick GMC Inventory Feed

entry.title: 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 Work Truck
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at 2720 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 Work Truck is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2025 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 Work Truck is finished in Summit White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

WT Convenience Package

  • Deep-Tinted Glass
  • Electric Rear-Window Defogger

WT Value Package ($460 value)

  • Trailering Package

Preferred Equipment Group 1WT

  • 4-Way Manual Driver Seat Adjuster
  • Locking Tailgate
  • Power Front Windows with Passenger Express Down
  • Solar Absorbing Tinted Glass
  • Remote Keyless Entry
  • Power Front Windows with Driver Express Up/down
  • 40/20/40 Front Split Bench Seat
  • Rubberized-Vinyl Floor Covering
  • Bluetooth For Phone
  • Inside Rearview Mirror with Tilt
  • Heated Power-Adjustable Outside Mirrors
  • Electronic Cruise Control
  • TurboMax Engine
  • Manual Tilt Wheel Steering Column
  • Single-Speed Transfer Case
  • Chevy Safety Assist
  • 255/70R17 AS BW Tires
  • Standard Tailgate
  • Manual Tailgate Function Delete
  • 17" X 8" Ultra Silver Painted Steel Wheels
  • Vinyl Seat Trim
  • Teen Driver
  • SiriusXM Delete
  • 3.5" Monochromatic Display Driver Info Center
  • OnStar Services Capable
  • Tire Pressure Monitoring System
  • HD Rear Vision Camera
  • Front Frame-Mounted Black Recovery Hooks
  • Black (semi-Gloss) Front Bumper
  • Black (semi-Gloss) Rear Bumper

Snow Plow Prep Package ($425 value)

  • Heavy-Duty Air Filter
  • 220 Amp Alternator
  • Skid Plates

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: Want more detail on this Silverado 1500, its pricing, or current GM offers? Reach out to Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC and we'll walk you through financing and trade-in options. Come and check out our full selection of new vehicles! Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 312-588-9421 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2720 S. Michigan Ave. Chicago IL 60616 Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC Online Pricing Disclaimer New vehicle inventory is offered for sale at the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP), as set by General Motors and/or General Motors Financial. Prices labeled as the "Napleton Price" include all eligible dealer discounts and/or manufacturer incentives and do not include taxes, title, license fees, documentation fees, optional equipment, or dealer-installed accessories selected by the customer at the time of purchase. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in the displayed pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice based on manufacturer program updates, incentive eligibility, or market conditions. Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC advertises its inventory on this website,[www.chicagochevybuickgmc.com], as well as on third-party advertising platforms. Pricing is specific to each vehicle, identified by its Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) and dealer stock number. The pricing shown on [www.chicagochevybuickgmc.com] represents the most current and accurate pricing for Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC. In the event of any discrepancy between this website and any third-party website, the pricing displayed on (https://www.chicagochevybuickgmc.com) will be considered the most accurate and will supersede all other advertised prices. While every effort is made to ensure the accuracy of the information on this site, errors may occur. Please verify all information with a Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC Client Advisor. You may do so by contacting us directly or visiting the dealership.

entry.title: 2026 Chevrolet Equinox FWD LT
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at 2720 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Chevrolet Equinox FWD LT is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Equinox FWD LT is finished in SUMMIT WHITE and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Rear collision mitigation - It has your back. Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you. If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at 2720 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Buick Encore GX Preferred is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Buick Encore GX Preferred is finished in Summit White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1SB

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.3L TURBO, SUMMIT WHITE Want more detail on this Encore GX, its pricing, or current GM offers? We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Buick Envision Sport Touring is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Buick Envision Sport Touring is finished in Brilliant Red and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Comfort and Convenience Package ($1,350 value)

  • Dual-Zone Automatic Climate Control Air Conditioning
  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • Heated Steering Wheel
  • Hands-Free Power Programmable Liftgate
  • Automatic Air Recirculation
  • 3-Channel Programmable Universal Home Remote
  • Air Quality Indicator Sensor

Preferred Equipment Group 1SL

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: ENGINE, 2.0L TURBO, 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, BRILLIANT RED Want more detail on this Envision, its pricing, or current GM offers? entry.title: 2026 Buick Envision Preferred
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at 2720 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Buick Envision Preferred is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Buick Envision Preferred is finished in Ebony Twilight Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, 2.0L TURBO, 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, EBONY TWILIGHT METALLIC Want more detail on this Envision, its pricing, or current GM offers? entry.title: 2026 Buick Envision Sport Touring
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at 2720 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Buick Envision Sport Touring is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Buick Envision Sport Touring is finished in Quartz Blue Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, 2.0L TURBO, 4-CYLINDER, SIDI, QUARTZ BLUE METALLIC Want more detail on this Envision, its pricing, or current GM offers? This 2026 Buick Encore GX Preferred is finished in Ocean Blue Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2026 Buick Encore GX Preferred
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at 2720 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Buick Encore GX Preferred is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Buick Encore GX Preferred is finished in Moonstone Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.3L TURBO, MOONSTONE GRAY METALLIC Want more detail on this Encore GX, its pricing, or current GM offers? For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Trax 1RS is finished in Summit White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at 2720 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Chevrolet Colorado 4WD Trail Boss is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Colorado 4WD Trail Boss is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 0TR

  • Chevy Safety Assist

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, TURBOMAX, TRANSMISSION, 8-SPEED AUTOMATIC, REAR AXLE, 3.42 RATIO, WHEELS, 18" X 8.5" (45.7 CM X 21.6 CM), HIGH GLOSS BLACK ALUMINUM, TIRES, 265/65R18 ALL-TERRAIN, BLACKWALL, 32" OD, TIRE, SPARE 265/70R17SL ALL-SEASON, BLACKWALL, STERLING GRAY METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, 11.3" DIAGONAL ADVANCED COLOR LCD DISPLAY WITH GOOGLE BUILT-IN, BEDLINER, SPRAY-ON, BLACK WITH CHEVROLET LOGO, LICENSE PLATE KIT, FRONT Want more detail on this Colorado, its pricing, or current GM offers? This 2023 Genesis G80 2.5T offered in Capri Blue will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control with lane change - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control with lane change, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up, and helps you make lane changes. Meet your ultimate co-pilot, hands-on cruise control with lane change.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.

entry.title: 2026 Chevrolet Trax LS
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at 2720 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Chevrolet Trax LS is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Trax LS is finished in Apex Red and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

Technology and Telematics

  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
Other notable features: APEX RED Want more detail on this Trax, its pricing, or current GM offers? This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

entry.title: 2025 Hyundai Santa Fe SEL
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. No Accidents! One Owner! This 2025 Hyundai Santa Fe SEL offered in Rockwood Green will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again. Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    Other notable features: OPTION GROUP 01, ROCKWOOD GREEN, GRAY, H-TEX LEATHERETTE SEAT TRIM Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 312-588-9421 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2720 S. Michigan Ave. Chicago IL 60616 Napleton Autos Online Pricing Disclaimer Certified Pre-Owned and used inventory is offered for sale to the public. Pricing indicated as "The Napleton Price" includes all applicable dealer discounts and/or manufacturer's incentives, and does not include any tax, title, doc fee, license, optional equipment costs and/or dealer installed add-on items selected by the customer at the time of sale. Destination charges may vary by model and are included in pricing. All pricing is subject to change without notice. Preferred Equipment Group 1LT

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2020 Hyundai Tucson SE
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2020 Hyundai Tucson SE offered in Aqua Blue will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Safety and Security

    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.
    • Driver Attention Alert - Snap To it. Sometimes the drive is boring, sometimes you're tired, sometimes your mind starts to drift. Driver attention alert uses sensors to monitor the vehicle and/or driver's behavior and will flash or sound a warning to help keep you focused on the road ahead. Driver Attention Alert helps ensure your car doesn't drift when you do.
    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
    Other notable features: OPTION GROUP 01, BLACK, YES ESSENTIALS STAIN-RESISTANT CLOTH SEAT TRIM, CARPETED FLOOR MATS, CARGO COVER Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. Give us a call at 312-588-9421 or stop by to test drive your new car, truck, or SUV today! 2720 S. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time.

entry.ns0:description:

This 2024 VOLKSWAGEN TAOS SE FWD offered in WHITE will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • Unresponsive driver assistant - a reaction to inaction. Maybe you fell asleep. Maybe you lost consciousness. No matter how it happens, Unresponsive driver assistant works to help lessen the danger when it does. It detects prolonged driver unresponsiveness, automatically bringing the vehicle to a stop and turning on the hazard lights. If equipped, emergency services will also be contacted. Unresponsive driver assistant is safety that never sleeps.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2022 Hyundai Santa Fe Calligraphy offered in Stormy Sea will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again. Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.

          NFC Key Card ($30 value)

            Convenience

            • Remote parking - Fit in anywhere! Remote parking system allows you to pull into or out of a space without having to be in the vehicle; simply use the remote control! It's perfect when the cars next to you are too close for you to be able open your doors. With remote parking, any spot is an open spot!
            • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

            Safety and Security

            • Hands-on cruise control with lane change - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control with lane change, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up, and helps you make lane changes. Meet your ultimate co-pilot, hands-on cruise control with lane change.
            • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

            Technology and Telematics

            • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
            Other notable features: OPTION GROUP 01, SAVILE SILVER, OBSIDIAN BLACK, NAPPA LEATHER SEATING SURFACES, NFC KEY CARD, ROOF RACK CROSS BARS, CARGO BLOCKS, FIRST AID KIT Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2015 Chevrolet Impala LTZ offered in Ashen Gray Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1LZ

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.
    • Smart device and keyfob engine start control - Phone ahead. Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob or your smart device, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, ,thanks to Smart device and Keyfob engine start control.

    Safety and Security

    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2026 Chevrolet Trax LS
entry.ns0:description:
Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is a family-owned Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC dealership at 2720 S Michigan Ave in Chicago, Illinois, along South Michigan Avenue in the South Loop. We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Chevrolet Trax LS is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Chevrolet Trax LS is finished in Sterling Gray Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

LS Convenience Package ($995 value)

  • Carpeted Rear Floor Mats
  • Remote Start
  • Heated Power-Adjustable Outside Mirrors
  • Body-Color Painted Mirror Caps
  • Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats
  • 17" Silver Painted Aluminum Wheels

Preferred Equipment Group 1LS

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, ECOTEC 1.2L TURBO DOHC DI WITH VARIABLE VALVE TIMING (VVT), TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.50 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, WHEELS, 17" (43.2 CM) SILVER-PAINTED ALUMINUM, STERLING GRAY METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET, JET BLACK/GRAY WITH BLUE ACCENTS, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, CHEVROLET INFOTAINMENT 3 SYSTEM, LS CONVENIENCE PACKAGE, MIRRORS, OUTSIDE HEATED POWER-ADJUSTABLE, MANUAL-FOLDING, MIRROR CAPS, PAINTED BODY-COLOR, LICENSE PLATE FRONT MOUNTING PACKAGE, SEATS, HEATED DRIVER AND FRONT PASSENGER, FLOOR MATS, CARPETED REAR, REMOTE START Want more detail on this Trax, its pricing, or current GM offers? entry.title: 2020 Chevrolet Trax LS
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2020 Chevrolet Trax LS offered in Silver Ice Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group 1LS

    Tint and Cruise Package ($495 value)

    • Deep-Tinted Rear Glass Windows and Liftgate
    • Electronic Automatic Cruise Control

    Convenience

    • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

    Safety and Security

    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
    • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.
    Other notable features: EMISSIONS, FEDERAL REQUIREMENTS, ENGINE, ECOTEC TURBO 1.4L VARIABLE VALVE TIMING DOHC 4-CYLINDER SEQUENTIAL MFI, TRANSMISSION, 6-SPEED AUTOMATIC, AXLE, 3.53 FINAL DRIVE RATIO, SILVER ICE METALLIC, SEATS, FRONT BUCKET WITH DRIVER POWER LUMBAR, JET BLACK, CLOTH SEAT TRIM, AUDIO SYSTEM, CHEVROLET INFOTAINMENT SYSTEM, TINT AND CRUISE PACKAGE, GLASS, DEEP-TINTED, REAR WINDOWS AND LIFTGATE, LICENSE PLATE BRACKET, FRONT, CRUISE CONTROL, ELECTRONIC, AUTOMATIC Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area.     • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians.     • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe
    • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2017 Nissan Pathfinder S offered in Gun Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Comfort

  • Fixed third-row seats

Convenience

  • Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.

In-car Entertainment

  • Touchscreen - flat out convenient. Say goodbye to the twists and turns of your daily drive...we're talking about buttons and knobs of course! Touchscreen allows you to control certain features with your fingertips, making it easy to use while also providing information at a glance. With touchscreen, your fingerprints will be all over your drive.

Safety and Security

  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

  • 19" X 7.5J" Machine-Face Finish Alloy Wheels
  • Power Sunroof
  • Ultrasonic Rear Occupant Alert

Convenience

  • Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and the vehicle ahead. It's stop/go feature automatically brings the vehicle to a stop if traffic stops and resumes distance pacing cruise when traffic starts to move again. Distance pacing cruise control with traffic stop-go; your ultimate co-pilot.

Safety and Security

  • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay & Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring

Remote Start Package ($525 value)

  • Electric Rear-Window Defogger
  • Unauthorized Entry Theft-Deterrent System

Safety and Security

  • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

Technology and Telematics

  • Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
  • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

This 2026 Buick Enclave Preferred is finished in Summit White and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them.   • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you.   • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

This 2026 Buick Enclave Preferred is finished in Ebony Twilight Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Safety and Security

  • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
  • Rear camera with washer - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. Even if there are sloppy conditions, the washer keeps the camera's view clean. Rear camera with washer is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe
  • Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift. With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane. Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.

We serve drivers across downtown Chicago and the greater Chicagoland area - including the Loop, Bronzeville, Hyde Park, Bridgeport, and the Near North Side. This 2026 Buick Envista Sport Touring is in our current inventory and available for a test drive today. For over 80 years the Napleton family has built its reputation on a no-pressure buying experience that keeps you in control of the process, backed by a factory-certified sales and service team that knows the Chevrolet, Buick, and GMC lineup inside and out. Our goal is simple: an honest, comfortable experience and a dealership you'll return to for both buying and service. This 2026 Buick Envista Sport Touring is finished in Ebony Twilight Metallic and makes a great addition to your family or business. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Preferred Equipment Group G03

    Safety and Security

    • Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.
    • Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Wireless Apple CarPlay/Wireless Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring
    • Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.

entry.title: 2010 Mercedes-Benz S-Class S 550
entry.ns0:description:
The Napleton Auto Group promotes a no pressure buying experience that puts the customer in charge of the buying process, and for over 80 years, the Napleton family has made sure that absolutely nothing is more important than our commitment to your satisfaction. Our staff members are professional in every sense of the word, and receive regular training, including factory certification, so they are truly knowledgeable about the vehicles we offer. We want every customer's experience to be as timely, comfortable and ultimately as satisfying as it possible can be. You'll see it in every department of every Napleton Auto Group dealership. We hope you'll join the thousands of other satisfied customers that buy and service their vehicles the Napleton way. This 2010 Mercedes-Benz S-Class S 550 offered in Majestic Black Metallic will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Convenience

  • Cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; cruise control.
  • Power close trunk/liftgate - Dump the slam. You're done loading up, now don't subject your passengers to the ear splitting sound of you slamming the back shut. All you have to do is hit the button and the power close trunk/liftgate takes care of the rest. You can walk away as the Power close trunk/liftgate gently closes and latches.

Safety and Security

  • Brake assist - Stop right there. Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now! With brake assist, you will. It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.

Technology and Telematics

  • Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain.
Other notable features: Napleton Downtown Chevrolet Buick GMC is proud to serve customers in communities throughout the Chicagoland area. This 2022 Hyundai Santa Cruz Limited offered in Phantom Black will make a great addition to your family or business! Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:

Option Group 01

    Convenience

    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.
    • GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.

    Safety and Security

    • Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.
    • Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.

    Technology and Telematics

    • Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
